perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair looks into the camera, smiling and pointing toward her friend who is sitting behind her on blue plastic chairs in an indoor badminton court. (2) The camera pans to focus on the friend, a woman with long black hair, who removes her oversized white t-shirt and proceeds to change her sports bra in the public seating area while other people are visible playing badminton in the background. (3) The first woman records her own shocked facial expressions, covering her mouth with her hand, as her friend finishes putting on a black sports bra over a pink one. (4) Both women look into the camera together at the end, one appearing shocked and the other indifferent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks excitedly in Chinese with a playful tone, accompanied by the ambient sounds of an indoor gym, such as distant shouting and the squeaking of shoes on the floor. (2) The speaker's volume increases with surprised exclamations and laughter as she reacts to the visual scene. (3) A second female voice enters briefly with a calm, questioning tone. (4) No background music is detected; only vocals and ambient court noise are present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '打羽毛球' (Playing badminton) and '打到一半有人在這邊' (Halfway through, someone is here). (2) Hook/Decorative Text: '當你朋友在大庭廣眾下換衣服' (When your friend changes clothes in public - Humorous hook) and '換衣服!!!' (Changing clothes!!! - Excited). (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '而且是換內衣喲?' (And she's changing her bra? - Mischievous tone), 'Oh my god!!!' (Shocked), '這個要確定欸..?' (Are you sure about this..? - Doubtful), '直接從下面往上穿?' (Putting it on from below? - Observational), '哇！！哇！！哇！！' (Wow!! - Amazed), '這18禁吧？？' (Is this 18+?? - Hyperbolic), '這不可能的...' (This is impossible... - Disbelieving), '直接原地嚇到！！' (Immediately shocked!! - Dramatic), and '這很正常吧？' (This is normal, right? - Casual/Punchline).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main females in the foreground, at least 1 male and 1 female visible playing badminton in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long light brown hair wearing a black spaghetti strap top; one woman with long black hair wearing a white t-shirt and then a black sports bra.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor gymnasium with yellow walls, blue plastic stadium-style seating, and wooden badminton courts with nets in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous short-form vlog intended for social media entertainment. It uses a 'shock value' hook by showing a friend engaging in the unexpected and bold behavior of changing her sports bra in a public sports facility. The content relies on the creator's exaggerated reaction and the friend's nonchalant attitude to create comedic tension.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced subtitle overlays and reaction-focused framing typical of TikTok/Reels vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The presence of prominent brand logos like Calvin Klein appears organic rather than a paid endorsement, serving as part of the characters' everyday attire.
